events.notes: One-off May 24. Free entry (suggested $10 donation). $30 vehicle parking. Live music: SunHunter + Andre's All-Stars. BBQ + tamales + beer + wine + raffle.

events.description_es: La 52ª Barbacoa Anual de los Bomberos Voluntarios de Muir Beach en Santos Meadow — una querida tradición del fin de semana del Día de los Caídos y una recaudación esencial para el Departamento. Música en vivo todo el día: SunHunter y Andre's All-Stars. Pollo a la BBQ, tamales vegetarianos, cerveza artesanal y vino. Rifa con más de 100 premios. De 12 a 5 pm.

events.event_name: Memorial Day Services — Marin Veterans' Memorial
events.address: 20 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: The Marin County Memorial Day observance conducted by Marin County United Veterans Council. Features music, a remembrance program, flag displays, and wreath-laying ceremonies honoring those who served.
events.notes: Annual civic ceremony. Confirm time at marincounty.gov.
events.event_name_es: Servicios del Día de los Caídos — Auditorio Memorial de Veteranos de Marin
events.description_es: La conmemoración del Día de los Caídos del Condado de Marin con música, programa de remembranza, exhibición de banderas y ceremonias de ofrenda floral en honor a quienes sirvieron.

events.event_name: BBQ on the Lawn — Rancho Nicasio (Memorial Day Weekend)
events.description: Celebrate Memorial Day at Rancho Nicasio with a BBQ on the Lawn featuring live music by Pablo Cruise. Family-friendly outdoor event in the heart of West Marin.
events.notes: May 25–27. Rancho Nicasio is a great West Marin family venue.
events.event_name_es: BBQ en el Césped — Rancho Nicasio (Fin de Semana del Día de los Caídos)
events.description_es: Celebra el Día de los Caídos en Rancho Nicasio con una barbacoa en el césped con música en vivo de Pablo Cruise. Evento familiar al aire libre en el corazón del oeste de Marin.

events.venue: Schooner Freda B — Sausalito Yacht Harbor
events.description: Afternoon sail on San Francisco Bay aboard the historic Schooner Freda B on Memorial Day, enjoying iconic Bay views from the water. All ages welcome.
events.notes: Confirm time and tickets at website.
events.event_name_es: Navegación al Atardecer del Día de los Caídos — Sausalito
events.description_es: Navegación vespertina por la Bahía de San Francisco a bordo de la histórica Goleta Freda B en el Día de los Caídos, disfrutando de las vistas icónicas de la bahía desde el agua.

events.event_name: MALT Guided Hike at Corda Family Ranch (May 15)
events.description: Guided hike at Corda Family Ranch, a MALT-protected landscape along Novato Boulevard. Experience an iconic Marin County agricultural landscape. Registration required.
events.notes: Registration required. Confirm time at malt.org.
events.event_name_es: Caminata Guiada de MALT en el Rancho Familiar Corda (15 de mayo)
events.description_es: Caminata guiada en el Rancho Familiar Corda, un paisaje protegido por MALT a lo largo del Bulevar de Novato. Se requiere registro.

events.event_name: MALT Guided Hike at Corda Family Ranch (May 16)
events.description: Guided hike at Corda Family Ranch, a MALT-protected landscape along Novato Boulevard. Experience an iconic Marin County agricultural landscape. Registration required.
events.notes: Registration required. Confirm time at malt.org.
events.event_name_es: Caminata Guiada de MALT en el Rancho Familiar Corda (16 de mayo)
events.description_es: Caminata guiada en el Rancho Familiar Corda, un paisaje protegido por MALT a lo largo del Bulevar de Novato. Se requiere registro.

events.event_name: Goodie's Kids' Club Workshop — Goodman Building Supply
events.description: Monthly kids' workshop at Goodman Building Supply where young DIY'ers aged 12 and under build creative arts and crafts projects — from birdhouses to stepping stones to holiday ornaments. Each project is free to attend and yours to take home. RSVP recommended to guarantee supplies.
events.registration: RSVP recommended — check goodmanbuildingsupply.net/goodies-kids-club for each month's project and registration form
events.notes: Second Saturday of each month, 12:30–2 PM (dates can shift month to month — verify at goodmanbuildingsupply.net/goodies-kids-club/). Free for children 12 & under; RSVP recommended by the Friday before. Project theme varies monthly.
events.event_name_es: Taller del Club de Niños de Goodie — Goodman Building Supply
events.description_es: Taller mensual para niños en Goodman Building Supply donde los pequeños artesanos de 12 años o menos construyen proyectos creativos de artes y manualidades — desde casitas para pájaros hasta piedras de jardín y ornamentos navideños. Cada proyecto es gratuito y se llevan a casa. Se recomienda RSVP para garantizar los materiales.

events.description: Free art-making program every 2nd Sunday of the month at the Museum of Contemporary Art in San Rafael. Professional instructor Wendy Ricks leads hands-on projects in painting, drawing, and mixed media. Reserve a time slot at 11 am, noon, 1 pm, or 2 pm by calling 415-506-0137 or emailing info@marinmoca.org. Runs 11 am–3 pm.
events.notes: 2nd Sunday of each month. Reserve a time slot: call 415-506-0137 or email info@marinmoca.org.
events.event_name_es: Día Familiar Gratuito en MarinMOCA
events.description_es: Programa gratuito de creación artística el segundo domingo de cada mes en el Museo de Arte Contemporáneo de San Rafael. La instructora profesional Wendy Ricks dirige proyectos prácticos de pintura, dibujo y técnicas mixtas. Reserve un horario a las 11 am, mediodía, 1 pm o 2 pm llamando al 415-506-0137 o enviando un correo a info@marinmoca.org.

events.description: The 3rd Annual PRIDE Mill Valley Kick-Off Party at the Downtown Plaza. A free, family-friendly community celebration with DJ, outdoor dining, activities, and family programming. 2–6 pm.
events.notes: Annual June event. Free and open to all.
events.event_name_es: Fiesta de Inicio del PRIDE de Mill Valley
events.description_es: La 3.ª Fiesta de Inicio Anual del PRIDE de Mill Valley en la Plaza del Centro. Una celebración comunitaria gratuita y apta para familias con DJ, actividades y entretenimiento al aire libre. De 2 a 6 pm.

events.description: Free comedy night at the Mill Valley Downtown Plaza, presented by the Mill Valley Arts Commission. Bring lawn chairs and blankets. All ages welcome.
events.notes: Free outdoor evening event. Bring lawn chairs and blankets.
events.event_name_es: Comedia en la Plaza
events.description_es: Noche de comedia gratuita en la Plaza del Centro de Mill Valley, presentada por la Comisión de Arte de Mill Valley. Traiga sillas de jardín y mantas. Todas las edades son bienvenidas.

events.event_name: Kids Cooking Contest at Marin Country Mart
events.description: Kids cooking competition under the Big Tent at Marin Country Mart. Young chefs show off their creativity and cooking skills in a lively community competition. Prizes awarded; judged by chef Veronica Salazar of El Huarache Loco. Free to attend.
events.notes: Free to watch. Fun family-friendly event.
events.event_name_es: Concurso de Cocina para Niños en Marin Country Mart
events.description_es: Competencia de cocina para niños bajo la Gran Carpa de Marin Country Mart. Los jóvenes chefs muestran su creatividad y habilidades culinarias. Premios otorgados; juzgado por la chef Veronica Salazar de El Huarache Loco. Entrada gratuita.

events.description: Free summer concert series at Novato Civic Green on select Fridays, June through August. 2026 lineup includes Git With It, Anthony Arya, the Fell Swoop, Big Blu Soul Quartet, and the Sean Carscadden Trio. 6–8 pm. Bring blankets and chairs.
events.notes: Select Fridays Jun 5, Jun 19, Jul 10, Jul 17, Aug 7, Aug 21. Free.
events.event_name_es: Conciertos en el Parque — Novato
events.description_es: Serie de conciertos de verano gratuitos en el Parque Cívico de Novato los viernes seleccionados de junio a agosto. Traiga mantas y sillas. De 6 a 8 pm.

events.venue: Old Corte Madera Square — Piccolo Pavilion
events.event_name: Summer Sunday Concerts — Old Corte Madera Square
events.address: Old Corte Madera Square, Corte Madera, CA 94925
events.description: Free outdoor summer concert series every Sunday at the Piccolo Pavilion in Old Corte Madera Square, June 14 through August 30. 2026 lineup includes Walking Mirrors, the Westons, Kanekoa, Boot Juice, Danny Click and Hell Yeahs, and the Corte Madera Town Band. 5–6:30 pm.
events.notes: Every Sunday Jun 14–Aug 30. 5–6:30 pm. Free.
events.event_name_es: Conciertos Dominicales de Verano — Old Corte Madera Square
events.description_es: Serie de conciertos de verano al aire libre gratuitos todos los domingos en el Piccolo Pavilion de Old Corte Madera Square, del 14 de junio al 30 de agosto. De 5 a 6:30 pm.

events.organization: City of Sausalito Parks and Recreation
events.event_name: Jazz and Blues by the Bay — Sausalito
events.address: Gabrielson Park, Humboldt Ave & Anchor St, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: Free weekly outdoor jazz and blues concert series at Gabrielson Park in Sausalito. Every Friday, June 5 through September 25 (no show July 3). Stunning Bay views; bring a low chair. 6:30–8 pm (6–7:30 pm in September). 2026 lineup includes the Beau Beau Band, Spike Sikes and His Awesome Hotcakes, Juke Joint, James Henry Hands on Fire, and more.
events.notes: Fridays Jun 5–Sep 25, no show Jul 3. Free. Bring low chair.
events.event_name_es: Jazz y Blues junto a la Bahía — Sausalito
events.description_es: Serie de conciertos gratuitos de jazz y blues al aire libre en el Parque Gabrielson de Sausalito. Todos los viernes del 5 de junio al 25 de septiembre (sin función el 3 de julio). Vistas espectaculares de la bahía; traiga una silla baja. De 6:30 a 8 pm.

events.address: 775 Miller Creek Rd, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Free outdoor summer concert series at Marinwood Community Center on select Fridays. Live music from Bay Area rock, bluegrass, and folk artists. Delicious BBQ by Marinwood Market. Bar for adults. Bring a picnic blanket. 6–8 pm. Dates: June 26, July 10, August 7, August 21.
events.notes: 4 Fridays: Jun 26, Jul 10, Aug 7, Aug 21. Free. BBQ available.
events.event_name_es: Música en el Parque — Marinwood
events.description_es: Serie de conciertos de verano gratuitos al aire libre en el Centro Comunitario Marinwood los viernes seleccionados. Música en vivo de artistas de rock, bluegrass y folk del Área de la Bahía. BBQ disponible. Traiga una manta para picnic. De 6 a 8 pm.

events.description: Ranger-led stargazing event at Mount Burdell Preserve. RSVP required for meeting location details. A wonderful evening under the stars in open space for all ages. Free.
events.notes: RSVP required for meeting location. Evening event.
events.event_name_es: Observación de Estrellas en Mount Burdell
events.description_es: Evento de observación de estrellas guiado por un guardabosques en la Reserva Mount Burdell. Se requiere inscripción previa para obtener detalles del punto de encuentro. Una maravillosa noche bajo las estrellas en espacio abierto para todas las edades. Gratis.

events.description: Ranger-led sunset stroll through Roy's Redwoods Preserve, one of Marin's most beautiful open spaces. A peaceful evening walk through the redwoods at golden hour. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Evening ranger walk. Beautiful redwood setting.
events.event_name_es: Paseo al Atardecer — Reserva Roy's Redwoods
events.description_es: Paseo al atardecer guiado por un guardabosques a través de la Reserva Roy's Redwoods. Un tranquilo camino vespertino entre las secuoyas durante la hora dorada. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Rare Plants of the Tiburon Peninsula Ranger Walk
events.description: Ranger-guided walk exploring the rare and endemic plants of the Tiburon Peninsula, including the famous tiburon mariposa lily. Ring Mountain Preserve is home to several plant species found nowhere else on Earth. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Rare endemic plants. Ring Mountain is a special botanical site.
events.event_name_es: Caminata por las Plantas Raras de la Península de Tiburon
events.description_es: Caminata guiada por un guardabosques para explorar las plantas raras y endémicas de la Península de Tiburon, incluido el famoso lirio mariposa de Tiburon. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: MALT Hike at Walker Creek Ranch (May 29)
events.description: Afternoon hike through Walker Creek Ranch in partnership with MALT, celebrating 40 years of permanent protection of this stunning 1,720-acre landscape. Hike along Walker Creek through alder and fragrant bay laurel forest — habitat for deer, fox, river otters, and newts. Registration required.
events.notes: Note: ID 134 is May 30 Community Day at same ranch — different event.
events.event_name_es: Caminata MALT en Walker Creek Ranch (29 de mayo)
events.description_es: Caminata vespertina a través de Walker Creek Ranch en colaboración con MALT, celebrando 40 años de protección permanente de este impresionante paisaje de 1,720 acres. Recorra Walker Creek a través de bosques de aliso y laurel aromático. Se requiere inscripción.

events.event_name: Goodie's Kids' Club — Kick Off to Summer Workshop
events.description: Goodie's Kids' Club monthly hands-on crafts workshop for children 12 and under. June theme: Kick Off to Summer. All supplies included. Free to attend. Registration required. 12:30–2:00 pm.
events.notes: Register via form on website. Space is limited.
events.event_name_es: Club de Niños Goodie — Taller de Inicio del Verano
events.description_es: Taller mensual de manualidades del Club de Niños Goodie para niños de 12 años o menos. Tema de junio: Inicio del Verano. Todos los materiales incluidos. Entrada gratuita. Se requiere inscripción. De 12:30 a 2:00 pm.

events.venue: Cushing Memorial Amphitheatre, Mount Tamalpais State Park
events.event_name: Mountain Play: The Wizard of Oz
events.address: East Ridgecrest Blvd, Mount Tamalpais State Park, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: The Mountain Play returns to Mount Tamalpais after a one-year hiatus with a production of The Wizard of Oz. Follow the yellow brick road to the historic Cushing Memorial Amphitheatre for this beloved Bay Area outdoor theater tradition. Performances June 7, 13, 14, and 21 at 1 pm. June 13 is a special Sing-Along Saturday. Adults $50; youth ages 4–25 $25; children 3 and under free.
events.notes: 4 performances: Jun 7, 13, 14, 21. Jun 13 = Sing-Along. Take shuttle from Marin Civic Center. Iconic Marin family tradition since 1913.
events.event_name_es: Mountain Play: El Mago de Oz
events.description_es: Mountain Play regresa al Monte Tamalpais con la producción de El Mago de Oz. Presentaciones el 7, 13, 14 y 21 de junio a la 1 pm en el Anfiteatro Cushing Memorial. El 13 de junio es un sábado especial para cantar juntos. Adultos $50; jóvenes de 4 a 25 años $25; menores de 3 años gratis.

events.description: Free outdoor summer concert series at the Hamilton Amphitheater in Novato on three Saturday evenings. Bring picnic blankets and lawn chairs for a relaxed community evening of live music, 5–7 pm. 2026 lineup: June 27 — Maya Latin Tribute Band; July 25 — Top Shelf Classics (Soul, R&B, Motown); August 29 — Club 90 (Dance music 1960s–today). Food available for purchase.
events.notes: 3 dates: Jun 27, Jul 25, Aug 29. Free. Food on-site. No pets.
events.event_name_es: Noches en el Anfiteatro — Novato
events.description_es: Serie de conciertos de verano gratuitos al aire libre en el Anfiteatro Hamilton de Novato en tres noches de sábado. Traiga mantas y sillas. De 5 a 7 pm. Programación 2026: 27 de junio — Maya Latin Tribute Band; 25 de julio — Top Shelf Classics; 29 de agosto — Club 90.

events.organization: Novato Festival of Art Wine and Music
events.event_name: Novato Festival of Art, Wine & Music
events.description: Annual two-day community festival on Grant Avenue in Downtown Novato. Live music across multiple stages, local art vendors, wine and craft beer tastings, kids area, and family activities. Saturday 11 am–7 pm, Sunday 11 am–6 pm. Free admission. A beloved 40+ year tradition in Novato.
events.notes: Jun 13–14. Free. Kids area confirmed. Parking in downtown Novato.
events.event_name_es: Festival de Arte, Vino y Música de Novato
events.description_es: Festival comunitario anual de dos días en Grant Avenue en el centro de Novato. Música en vivo en múltiples escenarios, vendedores de arte local, catas de vino y cerveza artesanal, área para niños y actividades familiares. Sábado 11 am–7 pm, domingo 11 am–6 pm. Entrada gratuita.

events.description: Free evening concert presented by Marin Harmony at the Belvedere Tiburon Library Founders Room. A welcoming community music event for all ages. Registration recommended. 6:30–7:30 pm.
events.notes: Tonight May 11. Register via library website.
events.event_name_es: Concierto Vespertino de Marin Harmony
events.description_es: Concierto vespertino gratuito presentado por Marin Harmony en la Sala Founders de la Biblioteca Belvedere Tiburon. Un evento musical comunitario para todas las edades. Se recomienda inscripción previa. De 6:30 a 7:30 pm.

events.address: King Mountain Loop Trail, Larkspur, CA 94939
events.description: Marin Hiking Moms is a community group for women and their children who want to disconnect from the noise and reconnect — with nature and with other women. One Saturday morning each month, the group meets at King Mountain Loop Trail in Larkspur for an easy, scenic hike followed by coffee. All fitness levels welcome. Come solo, bring a friend, bring a baby (carrier friendly) and/or a dog. Come once or come often. Join the WhatsApp group for the latest details and to connect with the group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/CStnj5OiEYSA0VoZIXEcvp?mode=gi_t. Follow on Instagram: @marinhikingmoms.
events.notes: Second Sunday of each month. Next hike: Sunday, June 14, 2026 at 9:30 AM — back to the full King Mountain scenic loop (a longer, more scenic route than the previous shorter outing). Meet point: https://maps.app.goo.gl/7ADgHvyadBYa2PGj8. Day and route can vary month to month — join the WhatsApp group for each meetup’s exact details.
events.event_name_es: Caminatas Mensuales de Marin Hiking Moms
events.description_es: Marin Hiking Moms es un grupo comunitario para mujeres y sus hijos que quieren desconectarse del ruido y reconectarse con la naturaleza y con otras mujeres. Un sabado por la manana cada mes, el grupo se reune en King Mountain Loop Trail en Larkspur para una caminata facil y pintoresca seguida de cafe. Todos los niveles de condicion fisica son bienvenidos. Venga solo, traiga un amigo, traiga a su bebe (apto para portabebes) y/o un perro. Venga una vez o venga seguido. Unase al grupo de WhatsApp para los ultimos detalles y para conectarse con el grupo: https://chat.whatsapp.com/CStnj5OiEYSA0VoZIXEcvp?mode=gi_t. Siganos en Instagram: @marinhikingmoms.

events.venue: Osher Marin JCC — Outdoor Tot Pool
events.address: 200 N. San Pedro Road, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Monthly drop-in pool party at the JCC's outdoor warm-water toddler pool on May 22 — just one foot deep and perfect for little ones. Includes age-appropriate pool toys, tunes, towels, and a bounce house. Family lane open in the big pool for older siblings. Bring a picnic dinner! No registration needed — just show up. Members free. Non-members $15 for one-child family, $20 for two or more children. 3:30–5:00 pm.
events.registration: None — drop in, pay at the door
events.notes: Confirmed 2026 date: May 22. Members free. Questions: rweiss@marinjcc.org.
events.event_name_es: Fiesta en la Piscina para Bebés — JCC
events.description_es: Fiesta mensual en la piscina al aire libre del JCC el May 22 — solo un pie de profundidad, perfecta para los más pequeños. Incluye juguetes de piscina apropiados para la edad, música, toallas y una casa inflable. Carril familiar abierto en la piscina grande para hermanos mayores. ¡Trae una cena de picnic! No se necesita registro — simplemente preséntese. Miembros gratis. No miembros: $15 para un hijo, $20 para dos o más hijos. De 3:30 a 5:00 pm.

Incluye juguetes de piscina apropiados para la edad, música, toallas y una casa inflable. Carril familiar abierto en la piscina grande para hermanos mayores. ¡Trae una cena de picnic! No se necesita registro — simplemente preséntese. Miembros gratis. No miembros: $15 para un hijo, $20 para dos o más hijos. De 3:30 a 5:00 pm.

events.event_name: St. Anselm School Festival of Fun
events.description: St. Anselm School annual Festival of Fun with carnival rides, games, cake walk, jumpy houses, live music, and more. A beloved community tradition in San Anselmo. 11 am–7 pm.
events.notes: Annual school carnival. Family fun. May 16.
events.event_name_es: Festival de Diversión de la Escuela St. Anselm
events.description_es: Festival anual de la Escuela St. Anselm con juegos mecánicos, juegos, pastel, casas inflables, música en vivo y más. Una amada tradición comunitaria en San Anselmo. 11 am–7 pm.

events.description: Free community celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month at Zelinsky Park in Tiburon. Family-friendly cultural activities and community gathering. 1–4 pm.
events.notes: Free. AAPI Heritage Month event. Zelinsky Park, Tiburon.
events.event_name_es: Celebración del Mes de la Herencia AAPI — Tiburon
events.description_es: Celebración comunitaria gratuita del Mes de la Herencia Asiático-Americana e Isleña del Pacífico en el Parque Zelinsky de Tiburon. Actividades culturales para toda la familia. De 1 a 4 pm.

events.event_name: U-Pick Strawberries at Blue Marble Acres
events.description: Pick your own sweet, fresh strawberries at Blue Marble Acres near Novato. A fun hands-on farm outing for the whole family. Saturday 10 am–2 pm. Check their Instagram for availability.
events.notes: U-pick strawberries. Seasonal — check Instagram for open days. May 16.
events.event_name_es: Recolección de Fresas en Blue Marble Acres
events.description_es: Recoja sus propias fresas frescas y dulces en Blue Marble Acres cerca de Novato. Una divertida excursión a la granja para toda la familia. Sábado de 10 am a 2 pm.

events.venue: Terra Linda Community Pool, 670 Del Ganado Rd
events.event_name: Water Safety Day — Terra Linda Community Pool
events.address: 670 Del Ganado Rd, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Free Water Safety Day at the Terra Linda Community Pool in San Rafael. Learn essential water safety skills and see live demonstrations. Great for families with young children. 1–4 pm.
events.notes: Free. May 17. Terra Linda pool — different from ID 190 (McNears Beach).
events.event_name_es: Día de Seguridad en el Agua — Piscina Terra Linda
events.description_es: Día gratuito de seguridad en el agua en la Piscina Comunitaria Terra Linda de San Rafael. Aprenda habilidades esenciales de seguridad acuática y vea demostraciones en vivo. De 1 a 4 pm.

events.description: Free hula performance at the Corte Madera Library in celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month. Open to all ages. 12:30–1:30 pm.

events.event_name_es: Actuación de Hula — Mes AAPI en la Biblioteca de Corte Madera

events.venue: Sweetwater Music Hall, 19 Corte Madera Ave
events.event_name: Sing & Stompers at Sweetwater Music Hall
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Mill Valley Library hosts a special offsite Sing & Stomp performance at Sweetwater Music Hall featuring musician Emily Bonn and her band, the Sing & Stompers! High-energy bluegrass music, playful movement, and lots of fun for all ages and families. Free. Stroller parking is extremely limited. Registration required — check the Mill Valley Library events calendar for the next date.
events.notes: UNPREDICTABLE — next 2026 date not yet posted. Last was Apr 25, 2026. Check MVL libcal for next date. Registration required —120 seats.
events.event_name_es: Sing & Stompers en Sweetwater Music Hall
events.description_es: La Biblioteca de Mill Valley presenta una actuación especial de Sing & Stomp en Sweetwater Music Hall con la música Emily Bonn y su banda. Música bluegrass, movimiento y diversión para todas las edades. Gratis. Se requiere registro — consulte el calendario de eventos de la biblioteca.

events.description: New late-summer signature community event from the Mill Valley Chamber of Commerce. Live music, line dancing, country-style buffet, whiskey tasting, mocktails, and a silent disco under the open sky. Kids can decorate their own cowboy hats in the dedicated craft area. A western-themed outdoor celebration for all ages. Date and tickets TBD — check enjoymillvalley.com for updates.
events.notes: UNPREDICTABLE — late summer 2026, exact date TBD. New signature event from MV Chamber. Kids craft area confirmed.
events.event_name_es: Mill Valley Rodeo Rave
events.description_es: Nuevo evento comunitario de verano tardío del Mill Valley Chamber of Commerce. Música en vivo, baile en línea, buffet estilo country, cata de whisky, mocktails y disco silencioso. Los niños pueden decorar sus propios sombreros de vaquero. Para todas las edades.

events.description: Annual Mill Valley Fall Art Festival at beautiful Old Mill Park. Local and regional artists showcase and sell their work among the redwoods. Live music, family activities, and food. 10 am–5 pm. Free admission.
events.notes: Annual event. Sep 19. Free admission. Old Mill Park among the redwoods.
events.event_name_es: Festival de Arte de Otoño de Mill Valley
events.description_es: Festival anual de arte de otoño de Mill Valley en el hermoso Old Mill Park. Artistas locales y regionales exhiben y venden su obra entre las secuoyas. Música en vivo, actividades familiares y comida. De 10 am a 5 pm. Entrada gratuita.

events.description: Ranger-guided walk through Indian Valley Preserve in Novato. Explore the open space trails and learn about local wildlife, native plants, and the natural history of the preserve. All ages welcome. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks ranger walk. May 17. Indian Valley Preserve, Novato.
events.event_name_es: Caminata con Guardabosques — Indian Valley
events.description_es: Caminata guiada por un guardabosques a través de la Reserva Indian Valley en Novato. Explore los senderos del espacio abierto y aprenda sobre la vida silvestre local, las plantas nativas y la historia natural de la reserva. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Music of Neil Young for Kids
events.address: 19 Corte Madera Avenue, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: The Rock and Roll Playhouse brings classic rock to the next generation — this time featuring the music of Neil Young! Games, movement, stories, and live music for families with children 10 and under. Doors at 11 am, show at 11:30 am. Children under 1 are free. Volume is turned down to protect little ears.
events.notes: Jun 16 Neil Young show. Separate from ID 79 (Jun 21 Grateful Dead). $15 tickets. All ages, wheelchair accessible.
events.event_name_es: Rock and Roll Playhouse: Música de Neil Young para Niños
events.description_es: ¡El Rock and Roll Playhouse lleva el rock clásico a la nueva generación con la música de Neil Young! Juegos, movimiento, cuentos y música en vivo para familias con niños menores de 10 años. Puertas a las 11 am, espectáculo a las 11:30 am.

events.address: 20 Avenue of the Flags, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: The 83rd annual Marin County Fair — Stars, Stripes & Stories, celebrating the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Rides, exhibits, animals, games, nightly fireworks at 9:30 pm, and headline concerts included in admission. Open 11 am–11 pm. Kids 12 & under FREE. Opening day. The Family Stone performs at 7:30 pm.
events.registration: Required — purchase online at marinfair.org (no ticket kiosks at entrance)

events.venue: Friends Field, Mill Valley Community Center
events.event_name: Day on the Green — Mill Valley Memorial Day
events.description: Free Memorial Day celebration on Friends Field following the Mill Valley parade. Live music noon–7 pm featuring Tainted Love, Secret Lives, Iriefuse, and the Mill Valley Middle School Jazz Band. Also celebrates the 25th anniversary of the Mill Valley Community Center — includes a toddler zone, free festive photo booth, and family activities for all ages.
events.notes: FREE. Starts after the Memorial Day Parade. Noon–7 pm. MVCC 25th anniversary celebration.
events.event_name_es: Día en el Parque — Memorial Day de Mill Valley
events.description_es: Celebración gratuita del Día de los Caídos en Friends Field, después del desfile de Mill Valley. Música en vivo de mediodía a 7 pm: Tainted Love, Secret Lives, Iriefuse y la Banda de Jazz de la Escuela Secundaria de Mill Valley. También celebra el 25 aniversario del Centro Comunitario de Mill Valley.

events.description: The annual Marin Greek Festival celebrates Greek culture with authentic food, live music, traditional dancing, and community fun. Friday hours 11 am–10 pm. Memorial Day weekend at the Nativity of Christ Greek Orthodox Church in Novato. Annual tradition since 1972.
events.description_es: El Festival Griego de Marin celebra la cultura griega con comida auténtica, música en vivo, danza tradicional y diversión comunitaria. Viernes de 11 am a 10 pm. Fin de semana del Día de los Caídos en la Iglesia Ortodoxa Griega en Novato.
events.notes: Friday May 22, 11 am–10 pm. Part of Memorial Day weekend series (Fri–Sun). Annual tradition since 1972.

events.venue: Mill Valley Library / Old Mill Park
events.event_name: Moms Storm the Library — SMMC Mill Valley
events.event_name_es: Mamás Asaltan la Biblioteca — SMMC Mill Valley
events.description: Southern Marin Mothers' Club Mill Valley Group presents Moms Storm the Library! Drop the kids, bring the babes and join for storytime at the Mill Valley Library followed by FREE coffee and pastries outside. 8:45–10:30 am. A fun way to show support for the Mill Valley Library's pilot program of extended summer hours — open at 8 am on Thursdays and 10 am on Saturdays.
events.description_es: ¡El Grupo de Mill Valley del Club de Madres del Sur de Marin presenta Mamás Asaltan la Biblioteca! Deja a los niños mayores, trae a los bebés y únete a la hora del cuento en la Biblioteca de Mill Valley seguida de café y pasteles GRATUITOS afuera. De 8:45 a 10:30 am.
events.notes: One-off Jun 4. SMMC event. Free coffee and pastries after storytime. Babies welcome. Mill Valley Library extended hours pilot: open 8am Thursdays and 10am Saturdays this summer.

events.event_name: Presidio Riding Club Spring Roundup — Family Day
events.description: Family day at the historic Presidio Riding Club Stables in the Marin Headlands. Meet the horses, explore the stables, climb hay bales, do arts & crafts, and enjoy a bake sale. 11 am roping demonstration. A wonderful introduction to horses for kids of all ages. ~$20 suggested donation per child.
events.notes: One-off May 31. Suggested donation ~$20/child via Venmo. Space limited — RSVP.
events.event_name_es: Día Familiar en el Club de Equitación Presidio
events.description_es: Día familiar en los establos históricos del Presidio Riding Club en el Marin Headlands. Conoce los caballos, explora los establos, trepa pacas de heno y haz manualidades. Donación sugerida ~$20 por niño.

events.description: All are welcome to Manor Elementary's 28th Annual Spring Faire — a beloved Fairfax tradition celebrating community and the end of the school year. Highlights include a zip line, superslide, air rockets, bicycle-powered smoothies, expanded live music lineup, dunk tank, inflatables, face painting, community clothing swap, and a full food court. Free entry. 10 am–4 pm.
events.notes: One-off May 30. Free entry. Open to all families. Major annual Fairfax community event.
events.event_name_es: 28ª Feria de Primavera de Manor Elementary
events.description_es: ¡Todas las familias son bienvenidas a la 28ª Feria de Primavera Anual de Manor Elementary! Tirolesa, tobogán gigante, cohetes de aire, batidos a pedal, música en vivo y más. Entrada gratuita. De 10 am a 4 pm.

events.organization: Nativity of Christ Greek Orthodox Church
events.event_name: Patio Playdate with Farmer Arann — Novato
events.description: Join Farmer Arann for an interactive music playdate for babies and toddlers in the church courtyard. Free, no registration needed. 10–11 am.
events.notes: One-off May 31. Free. Ages 0–5. Outdoor courtyard at the church.
events.event_name_es: Playdate en el Patio con Farmer Arann — Novato
events.description_es: Únete a Farmer Arann para un playdate musical interactivo para bebés y niños pequeños en el patio de la iglesia. Gratis, sin inscripción. De 10 a 11 am.

events.organization: Le Petit Jardin French Immersion Preschool
events.event_name: Le Petit Jardin Teddy Bear Pique-Nique
events.description: Free annual spring picnic and open house at Le Petit Jardin French Immersion Preschool. Dress in your 'frenchiest' spring picnic attire and bring your favorite teddy or stuffed animal. Enjoy complimentary picnic fare on the grassy play yard, crafts and activities for young children, and learn about the school. 11 am–1 pm.
events.notes: One-off May 31. FREE. Great intro to LPJ for prospective families. Bring a teddy bear.
events.event_name_es: Pique-Nique del Oso de Peluche — Le Petit Jardin
events.description_es: Picnic de primavera gratuito y jornada de puertas abiertas en Le Petit Jardin. Viste tu mejor atuendo primaveral francés y trae tu oso de peluche favorito. Picnic, manualidades y actividades para niños. De 11 am a 1 pm.

events.venue: Marin Country Mart — The Big Tent
events.event_name: Father's Day BBQ at Marin Country Mart
events.description: Annual Father's Day BBQ under the big tent with Suppenküche: ribs, bratwurst, burgers, pretzels and more, plus live music (Foxes in the Henhouse 11–2, The Depot Band 3–5). All ages.
events.notes: One-off Jun 16. Father's Day BBQ by Suppenkuche. Under the Big Tent. 11am–6pm.
events.event_name_es: BBQ del Día del Padre en Marin Country Mart
events.description_es: BBQ anual del Día del Padre bajo la gran carpa con Suppenküche: costillas, bratwurst, hamburguesas, pretzels y más, además de música en vivo (11–2 y 3–5). Todas las edades.

events.description: Explore Fairfax on a family treasure hunt with the Marin Museum of Bicycling. A fun way to discover the town and the museum. 1 pm start.
events.notes: One-off May 31. Free. 1 pm. Explore Fairfax on foot/bike.
events.event_name_es: Búsqueda del Tesoro Familiar — Museo de Bicicletas de Marin
events.description_es: Explora Fairfax en una búsqueda del tesoro familiar con el Museo de Bicicletas de Marin. Una forma divertida de descubrir la ciudad y el museo. Comienza a la 1 pm.

events.event_name: Phoenix Used Bookshop Grand Opening Party
events.event_name_es: Fiesta de Gran Apertura de Phoenix Used Bookshop
events.description: Grand Opening Party at The Phoenix Used Bookshop — Marin County's newest used bookshop dedicated to kids and teens ages 0–16, at 501 Magnolia Ave in Larkspur. Drop in all day for free goodies for the kids and a $100 gift card giveaway. The Phoenix specializes in used books for children and teens, with an all-ages store already in the works. Books can be donated or traded in. Join the community!
events.description_es: Fiesta de Gran Apertura en The Phoenix Used Bookshop — la nueva librería de libros usados de Marin dedicada a niños y adolescentes de 0 a 16 años, en 501 Magnolia Ave en Larkspur. Pasa todo el día para recibir obsequios gratis para los niños y un sorteo de tarjeta de regalo de $100.
events.registration: Not required — drop in all day
events.notes: Grand Opening — drop in all day May 16. Free goodies + $100 gift card giveaway. Kids/teens bookshop, ages 0-16. New store in Larkspur.

events.event_name: MAGC Summer Concert Series — African dance music
events.event_name_es: Serie de Conciertos de Verano de MAGC — African dance music
events.address: 20 Sir Francis Drake Boulevard, Ross, CA 94957
events.description: Marin Art and Garden Center's popular Summer Concert Series — Thursday evenings July 9–August 27, 2026. July concerts on the Gazebo Lawn (5–7pm); August concerts in the Redwood Amphitheater (5–6pm). Bring your picnic, refillable water bottle, blanket, and low-backed lawn chairs (folding chairs also provided). Beer, wine, non-alcoholic drinks, snacks, and Fox Pizza available for purchase. Outside alcohol not permitted. Tickets ~$20 adults pre-purchased / $25 walk-in; children under 17 FREE.
events.description_es: La popular Serie de Conciertos de Verano del Marin Art and Garden Center — los jueves del 9 de julio al 27 de agosto de 2026. Entradas ~$20 adultos / $25 en la entrada; niños menores de 17 GRATIS.
events.notes: One-off 2026-07-09. Lawn — 5–7pm. Genre: African dance music. Annual Summer Concert Series. Kids under 17 free.

events.description: Marin County Parks ranger-led bird walk through the oak woodlands and grasslands of Mount Burdell. All ages welcome; bring water and binoculars. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks ranger walk. June sweep.
events.event_name_es: Observación de Aves en Mount Burdell
events.description_es: Caminata de observación de aves guiada por un guardabosques del Condado de Marin por los robledales y praderas de Mount Burdell. Todas las edades; traiga agua y binoculares. Gratis.

events.address: Loma Alta Preserve, Fairfax/San Anselmo, CA 94930
events.description: Marin County Parks naturalist outing spotting late-spring wildflowers and birds along the Loma Alta fire road. Family-friendly with moderate walking. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. Trailhead Fairfax/San Anselmo; location group San Anselmo.
events.event_name_es: Aves y Flores de Loma Alta
events.description_es: Salida con naturalista del Condado de Marin para observar flores silvestres y aves de fin de primavera en Loma Alta. Apto para familias, caminata moderada. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.address: Stafford Lake Park, 3549 Novato Blvd, Novato, CA 94947
events.description: Meet live animal ambassadors with WildCare educators at Stafford Lake Park — a hands-on wildlife program great for kids. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. Strong kids event.
events.event_name_es: Conoce la Vida Silvestre con WildCare
events.description_es: Conoce embajadores animales vivos con educadores de WildCare en Stafford Lake Park, un programa práctico de vida silvestre ideal para niños. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Trails, Tales, and Root Beer Floats
events.description: Family afternoon on Ring Mountain with ranger-led stories, easy trails, and root beer floats. A relaxed outdoor program for all ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. Strong family event.
events.event_name_es: Senderos, Cuentos y Root Beer Floats
events.description_es: Tarde familiar en Ring Mountain con cuentos guiados por guardabosques, senderos fáciles y root beer floats. Un programa al aire libre relajado para todas las edades. Gratis.

events.description: Marin County Parks guided walk to spot and learn about local butterflies in Indian Valley. All ages; moderate trail walking. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks.
events.event_name_es: Mariposas de Indian Valley
events.description_es: Caminata guiada del Condado de Marin para observar y aprender sobre las mariposas locales en Indian Valley. Todas las edades; caminata moderada. Gratis.

events.description: Start the morning with a ranger at Rush Creek Preserve — a casual guided stroll with juice and conversation about the marsh and its wildlife. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks.
events.event_name_es: Jugo con un Guardabosques
events.description_es: Comienza la mañana con un guardabosques en Rush Creek Preserve, un paseo guiado informal con jugo y conversación sobre la marisma y su fauna. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.address: Bear Valley, Point Reyes National Seashore, Point Reyes Station, CA 94956
events.description: Marin County Parks guided outing in the Bear Valley area of Point Reyes. Family-suitable nature walk; bring water and sturdy shoes. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. West Marin.
events.event_name_es: Bear Valley
events.description_es: Salida guiada del Condado de Marin en el área de Bear Valley en Point Reyes. Caminata natural apta para familias; traiga agua y zapatos resistentes. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.description: Evening ranger program on Ring Mountain exploring the preserve after sundown — listen for owls and learn about nocturnal life. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. Calendar header showed Jun 27; event detail says Fri Jun 26 — confirm if needed.
events.event_name_es: Espacio Abierto Después del Anochecer
events.description_es: Programa nocturno con guardabosques en Ring Mountain para explorar la reserva después del atardecer: escucha búhos y aprende sobre la vida nocturna. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: The Road to Becoming a Ranger
events.description: Kids meet a Marin County Parks ranger at Deer Island Preserve to learn what rangers do and explore the trail together. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. Kids-oriented.
events.event_name_es: El Camino para Ser Guardabosques
events.description_es: Los niños conocen a un guardabosques del Condado de Marin en Deer Island Preserve para aprender qué hacen los guardabosques y explorar el sendero juntos. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.address: Blackstone Canyon, Marinwood, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Marin County Parks family walk through Blackstone Canyon in Marinwood — an easy guided outing designed for families with young children. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Marin County Parks. Family walk.
events.event_name_es: Caminata Familiar: Blackstone Canyon
events.description_es: Caminata familiar del Condado de Marin por Blackstone Canyon en Marinwood, una salida guiada fácil diseñada para familias con niños pequeños. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.description: Bolinas' classic Independence Day celebration with a parade, BBQ, live music, beach games, and the traditional Bolinas–Stinson Beach tug-of-war. Roads into downtown close 8 am–5 pm; paid parking ($10) at Mesa Park with a free shuttle. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. West Marin. Roads closed 8 am–5 pm.
events.event_name_es: Celebración del 4 de Julio en Bolinas
events.description_es: Clásica celebración del Día de la Independencia en Bolinas con desfile, BBQ, música en vivo, juegos en la playa y el tradicional juego de la cuerda entre Bolinas y Stinson Beach. Estacionamiento pagado ($10) en Mesa Park con transporte gratuito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: American Legion 4th of July Pancake Breakfast — Larkspur
events.description: Pancake breakfast and Gin Fizz booth hosted by American Legion Post 313 and Boy Scout Troop 43 in downtown Larkspur — a great stop before the Corte Madera–Larkspur parade. Pancakes, sausages, juice, and coffee. Opening flag ceremony 7:45 am.
events.notes: July 4. Pairs with parade ID 187. Benefits Post 313 & Troop 43.
events.event_name_es: Desayuno de Panqueques del 4 de Julio de la Legión Americana — Larkspur
events.description_es: Desayuno de panqueques y puesto de Gin Fizz organizado por la Legión Americana Post 313 y la Tropa 43 de Boy Scouts en el centro de Larkspur, una gran parada antes del desfile de Corte Madera–Larkspur. Panqueques, salchichas, jugo y café.

events.venue: Inverness Way near the fire station
events.description: Inverness' annual Independence Day festivities featuring foot races for the whole family, from toddlers to adults, plus community fun near the fire station. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. West Marin. Family foot races.
events.event_name_es: Festividades del 4 de Julio en Inverness
events.description_es: Festividades anuales del Día de la Independencia en Inverness con carreras a pie para toda la familia, desde niños pequeños hasta adultos, además de diversión comunitaria cerca de la estación de bomberos. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Homestead Valley 4th of July Parade & Picnic
events.address: Stolte Grove, Homestead Valley, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Homestead Valley's family-focused Independence Day parade from Volunteer Park to Stolte Grove, led by a red fire truck, followed by an all-American BBQ picnic with food, drink, and entertainment. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. Mill Valley (Homestead Valley).
events.event_name_es: Desfile y Picnic del 4 de Julio de Homestead Valley
events.description_es: Desfile familiar del Día de la Independencia de Homestead Valley desde Volunteer Park hasta Stolte Grove, encabezado por un camión de bomberos rojo, seguido de un picnic BBQ con comida, bebida y entretenimiento. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.venue: Redwood Credit Union lot, 1010 Grant Ave
events.description: The 72nd annual Buckaroo Breakfast in downtown Novato — eggs, pancakes, sausage, juice, and coffee before the parade. Net proceeds benefit Homeward Bound. Suggested donation $10 adults / $5 kids.
events.notes: July 4. Pairs with Novato parade. Benefits Homeward Bound.
events.event_name_es: Desayuno Buckaroo de Novato
events.description_es: El 72.º desayuno anual Buckaroo en el centro de Novato: huevos, panqueques, salchichas, jugo y café antes del desfile. Las ganancias netas benefician a Homeward Bound. Donación sugerida $10 adultos / $5 niños.

events.address: Grant Ave & Railroad Ave, Downtown Novato, CA 94945
events.description: Novato's Independence Day parade — one of the largest in the Bay Area, with 100+ entries from classic cars and vintage military vehicles to bagpipers and a Chinese drum and bell corps. Draws 15,000–20,000 spectators. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. Novato. One of the largest in the Bay Area.
events.event_name_es: Desfile del 4 de Julio de Novato
events.description_es: El desfile del Día de la Independencia de Novato, uno de los más grandes del Área de la Bahía, con más de 100 participantes desde autos clásicos y vehículos militares antiguos hasta gaiteros y un cuerpo de tambores chino. Atrae a 15,000–20,000 espectadores. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.description: Town of Ross Independence Day parade and picnic on the Ross Common with live music, food, kids' games, and a Patriotic Pooch dog contest. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. Town of Ross; location group San Anselmo per DB convention.
events.event_name_es: Desfile y Celebración del 4 de Julio de Ross
events.description_es: Desfile y picnic del Día de la Independencia del pueblo de Ross en Ross Common con música en vivo, comida, juegos para niños y un concurso canino Patriotic Pooch. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Sausalito 4th of July Parade & Fireworks Extravaganza
events.time: Parade 10:00 AM; live music 6:30–9 PM; fireworks ~9:15 PM
events.description: Sausalito's Independence Day parade down 2nd and Main (10 am), followed by an afternoon picnic at Dunphy Park (12–4 pm), and an evening Fireworks Extravaganza at Gabrielson Park with live music from Top Shelf Classics (6:30–9 pm); fireworks begin ~9:15 pm. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. Parade morning + fireworks evening; consider splitting if desired.
events.event_name_es: Desfile y Espectáculo de Fuegos Artificiales del 4 de Julio de Sausalito
events.description_es: El desfile del Día de la Independencia de Sausalito por 2nd y Main (10 am), seguido de un picnic vespertino en Dunphy Park (12–4 pm), y un espectáculo nocturno de fuegos artificiales en Gabrielson Park con música en vivo de Top Shelf Classics (6:30–9 pm); los fuegos artificiales comienzan ~9:15 pm. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Angel Island–Tiburon Ferry 4th of July Fireworks Cruise
events.description: Evening fireworks cruise from the Tiburon ferry dock to view the San Francisco fireworks from the Bay. Bring a picnic dinner; cash bar aboard, no outside alcohol. Returns ~10:30 pm. ~$118.72 adults, $94.34 kids 6–12, free under 6. Reservations required.
events.notes: July 4. PAID. SF-fireworks viewing from Tiburon.
events.event_name_es: Crucero de Fuegos Artificiales del 4 de Julio del Ferry Angel Island–Tiburon
events.description_es: Crucero nocturno desde el muelle del ferry de Tiburon para ver los fuegos artificiales de San Francisco desde la bahía. Traiga una cena de picnic; bar de pago a bordo. ~$118.72 adultos, $94.34 niños 6–12, gratis menores de 6. Se requiere reservación.

events.organization: San Geronimo Valley Lions Club / Woodacre Fire
events.venue: Woodacre Fire Station, 33 Castle Rock Ave
events.description: Firefighters' pancake breakfast in Woodacre with a bounce house, fire engine rides, kids' activities, and a special guest. $10 adults / $5 kids, cash only. A great start to the San Geronimo Valley 4th of July.
events.notes: July 4. San Geronimo Valley cluster.
events.event_name_es: Desayuno de Panqueques de los Bomberos de Woodacre
events.description_es: Desayuno de panqueques de los bomberos en Woodacre con casa inflable, paseos en camión de bomberos, actividades para niños y un invitado especial. $10 adultos / $5 niños, solo efectivo.

events.venue: Woodacre Improvement Club → Railroad Ave → Dickson Ranch
events.event_name: San Geronimo Valley Independence Day Parade & Country Fun Day
events.address: Woodacre Improvement Club, 1 Garden Way, Woodacre, CA 94973
events.description: San Geronimo Valley's Independence Day parade and country fun day, beginning at the Woodacre Improvement Club at noon and following Railroad Avenue to Dickson Ranch. All ages. Free.
events.notes: July 4. Parade precedes the Lions BBQ (ID 412).
events.event_name_es: Desfile e Independencia del Valle de San Geronimo y Día de Diversión Campestre
events.description_es: Desfile del Día de la Independencia del Valle de San Geronimo y día de diversión campestre, que comienza en el Woodacre Improvement Club al mediodía y sigue por Railroad Avenue hasta Dickson Ranch. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: San Geronimo Valley Lions BBQ — Dickson Ranch
events.description: Annual San Geronimo Valley Lions BBQ at Dickson Ranch right after the parade — games, horse and pony rides, burgers and hot dogs, a flea market, and live music. Free admission. All ages.
events.notes: July 4. Follows the parade (ID 411).
events.event_name_es: BBQ del Club de Leones del Valle de San Geronimo — Dickson Ranch
events.description_es: BBQ anual del Club de Leones del Valle de San Geronimo en Dickson Ranch justo después del desfile: juegos, paseos en caballo y pony, hamburguesas y hot dogs, mercado de pulgas y música en vivo. Entrada gratuita. Todas las edades.

events.address: Sausalito Public Library, 420 Litho St, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: Educators from the Lindsay Wildlife Experience rehabilitation center in Walnut Creek showcase live animal ambassadors — a raptor, a reptile, and a surprise mystery animal — and highlight the adaptations that help them thrive in the California wild. Part of the Sausalito Public Library's free Summer Reading Events. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Sausalito Public Library Free Summer Reading Events 2026 (from library flyer).
events.event_name_es: Presentación de Fauna Nativa
events.description_es: Educadores del centro de rehabilitación Lindsay Wildlife Experience de Walnut Creek presentan embajadores animales vivos — un ave rapaz, un reptil y un animal misterioso sorpresa — y destacan las adaptaciones que les ayudan a prosperar en la naturaleza de California. Parte de los eventos gratuitos de lectura de verano de la Biblioteca de Sausalito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.address: Sausalito Public Library, 420 Litho St, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: A high-energy, silly dinosaur-themed magic and puppet show packed with laughs, surprises, and kid-friendly tricks to delight young audiences. Part of the Sausalito Public Library's free Summer Reading Events. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Sausalito Public Library Free Summer Reading Events 2026 (from library flyer).
events.event_name_es: Show de Títeres y Magia de Dinosaurios
events.description_es: Un show de magia y títeres de dinosaurios lleno de energía, risas, sorpresas y trucos aptos para niños que encantará al público joven. Parte de los eventos gratuitos de lectura de verano de la Biblioteca de Sausalito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Duncan Playful Circus: The True Color of Love / El Verdadero Color de Amor
events.address: Sausalito Public Library, 420 Litho St, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: A joyful bilingual musical circus theater performance — with jokes, juggling, and a big interactive magnet board — following a young girl on a journey of discovery into nature. Presented by Duncan Playful Circus as part of the Sausalito Public Library's free Summer Reading Events. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Sausalito Public Library Free Summer Reading Events 2026 (from library flyer).
events.event_name_es: Duncan Playful Circus: El Verdadero Color de Amor
events.description_es: Una alegre actuación bilingüe de teatro circense musical — con chistes, malabares y un gran tablero magnético interactivo — que sigue a una niña en un viaje de descubrimiento hacia la naturaleza. Presentado por Duncan Playful Circus como parte de los eventos gratuitos de lectura de verano de la Biblioteca de Sausalito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.address: Sausalito Public Library, 420 Litho St, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: An energetic, participatory presentation of Australian music, culture, art, science, and laughs — come hear and learn all about didgeridoos and make music of your own. Part of the Sausalito Public Library's free Summer Reading Events. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Sausalito Public Library Free Summer Reading Events 2026 (from library flyer).
events.event_name_es: Didgeridoo Down Under
events.description_es: Una presentación participativa y enérgica de música, cultura, arte, ciencia y risas australianas — ven a escuchar y aprender todo sobre los didgeridoos y crea tu propia música. Parte de los eventos gratuitos de lectura de verano de la Biblioteca de Sausalito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.event_name: Reptiles with Jungle James Animal Adventures
events.address: Sausalito Public Library, 420 Litho St, Sausalito, CA 94965
events.description: Get up close with live reptile friends from around the world and learn about their habitats, habits, and unique features in this interactive presentation with Jungle James Animal Adventures. Part of the Sausalito Public Library's free Summer Reading Events. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Sausalito Public Library Free Summer Reading Events 2026 (from library flyer).
events.event_name_es: Reptiles con Jungle James Animal Adventures
events.description_es: Conoce de cerca a amigos reptiles vivos de todo el mundo y aprende sobre sus hábitats, costumbres y características únicas en esta presentación interactiva con Jungle James Animal Adventures. Parte de los eventos gratuitos de lectura de verano de la Biblioteca de Sausalito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.description: Mike the San Francisco Bubble Man brings his fabulous giant bubble show and interactive bubble-making to the Sweeny Park lawn. Part of the Sausalito Public Library's free Summer Reading Events. All ages. Free.
events.notes: Sausalito Public Library Free Summer Reading Events 2026 (from library flyer).
events.event_name_es: Mike el Hombre de las Burbujas
events.description_es: Mike, el Hombre de las Burbujas de San Francisco, trae su fabuloso espectáculo de burbujas gigantes y la creación interactiva de burbujas al césped de Sweeny Park. Parte de los eventos gratuitos de lectura de verano de la Biblioteca de Sausalito. Todas las edades. Gratis.

events.address: Quietwood Grove, Marinwood, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: A weekly outdoor play group for children and parents — gather outside to play, connect, and grow together. All ages welcome. Meets Tuesday mornings 9:30–11:30 AM (and Thursday afternoons 3–5 PM) at Quietwood Grove in Marinwood. Join the WhatsApp group for details and updates.
events.registration: Join the WhatsApp group to take part and for details
events.notes: Twice weekly (Tue 9:30–11:30 AM + Thu 3–5 PM). Google Maps: https://goo.gl/maps/gNZ1HMZYETfdg1cR6. Source: group WhatsApp.
events.event_name_es: Grupo de Juego Little Grove
events.description_es: Un grupo de juego al aire libre semanal para niños y padres: nos reunimos afuera para jugar, conectar y crecer juntos. Todas las edades bienvenidas. Se reúne los martes por la mañana de 9:30 a 11:30 AM (y los jueves por la tarde de 3 a 5 PM) en Quietwood Grove, Marinwood. Únete al grupo de WhatsApp para más información y novedades.

events.address: Quietwood Grove, Marinwood, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: A weekly outdoor play group for children and parents — gather outside to play, connect, and grow together. All ages welcome. Meets Thursday afternoons 3–5 PM (and Tuesday mornings 9:30–11:30 AM) at Quietwood Grove in Marinwood. Join the WhatsApp group for details and updates.

events.notes: Twice weekly (Tue 9:30–11:30 AM + Thu 3–5 PM). Google Maps: https://goo.gl/maps/gNZ1HMZYETfdg1cR6. Source: group WhatsApp.
events.event_name_es: Grupo de Juego Little Grove
events.description_es: Un grupo de juego al aire libre semanal para niños y padres: nos reunimos afuera para jugar, conectar y crecer juntos. Todas las edades bienvenidas. Se reúne los jueves por la tarde de 3 a 5 PM (y los martes por la mañana de 9:30 a 11:30 AM) en Quietwood Grove, Marinwood. Únete al grupo de WhatsApp para más información y novedades.

events.event_name: Bel Marin Keys Neighborhood Garage Sale
events.address: Bel Marin Keys Blvd, Novato, CA 94949
events.description: Bel Marin Keys holds its annual neighborhood block-party garage sale, with homes across the community taking part. It's a fun morning to stroll the streets and hunt for finds — everything from baby and kids' gear to furniture and household treasures. Free to browse; bring cash and a tote. 9 AM–2 PM.
events.notes: Annual neighborhood-wide garage sale; most homes participate. Hours approximate (9 AM–2 PM). Added from community message.
events.event_name_es: Venta de Garaje del Vecindario Bel Marin Keys
events.description_es: Bel Marin Keys realiza su venta de garaje anual de todo el vecindario, con casas de toda la comunidad participando. Una mañana para recorrer las calles y buscar tesoros: desde artículos para bebés y niños hasta muebles y objetos para el hogar. Entrada gratuita; trae efectivo y una bolsa. 9 AM–2 PM.

events.organization: Mothers Out Front Marin & Postpartum Support Center
events.address: 775 Miller Creek Rd, San Rafael, CA 94903
events.description: Mothers Out Front Marin and the Postpartum Support Center host a toy drive and playground meetup at Marinwood Creek Playground. Bring gently used toys in good condition — clean, with no missing or broken parts — to donate to families supported by the Postpartum Support Center. Then stay to play and make kid-friendly up-cycled crafts together. Free; all families welcome. 9:30–11:30 AM.
events.notes: Toy drive (clean toys, no missing/broken parts) benefiting Postpartum Support Center families, plus up-cycled crafts. Organizers: Mothers Out Front Marin & PPSC. From event flyer.
events.event_name_es: Colecta de Juguetes y Encuentro en el Parque
events.description_es: Mothers Out Front Marin y el Postpartum Support Center organizan una colecta de juguetes y encuentro en el parque infantil Marinwood Creek. Trae juguetes usados en buen estado —limpios, sin piezas faltantes ni rotas— para donar a familias apoyadas por el Postpartum Support Center. Luego quédate a jugar y hacer manualidades recicladas para niños. Gratis; todas las familias bienvenidas. 9:30–11:30 AM.

events.organization: Western Weekend Committee (Lions Club & Rotary Club of West Marin)
events.event_name: Western Weekend: Day 1 — Wild West Market & Barn Dance
events.time: Farmers Market 9 AM–2 PM; Barn Dance in the evening
events.description: Western Weekend kicks off in downtown Point Reyes Station, celebrating West Marin's rural roots. Shop the “Wild West” Farmers Market at Toby's Feed Barn (9 AM–2 PM), browse local shops and art galleries, then put on your dancing boots for the annual Barn Dance at the Dance Palace in the evening — free, all ages, hosted by West Marin Commons.
events.notes: Day 1 of the 2-day Western Weekend festival (Jun 6–7). Wild West Farmers Market at Toby's Feed Barn 9am–2pm; Barn Dance at the Dance Palace (evening, free, all ages). Expires = festival's last day. From westernweekend.org.
events.event_name_es: Western Weekend: Día 1 — Mercado Wild West y Baile en el Granero
events.description_es: Western Weekend comienza en el centro de Point Reyes Station, celebrando las raíces rurales de West Marin. Visita el Mercado de Agricultores “Wild West” en Toby's Feed Barn (9 AM–2 PM), recorre las tiendas locales y galerías de arte, y por la noche ponte las botas para el Baile en el Granero anual en el Dance Palace: gratis, todas las edades, organizado por West Marin Commons.

events.organization: Western Weekend Committee (Lions Club & Rotary Club of West Marin)
events.time: Food Corral from 11:30 AM; Parade 12 PM (noon)
events.address: Main St, Point Reyes Station, CA 94956
events.description: The Western Weekend parade steps off at noon on Main Street in Point Reyes Station — decorated horses, colorful floats, local bands, dancers, and vintage cars. Come early for a good spot. The Food Corral feast opens at 11:30 AM by Toby's Feed Barn, with music and live parade commentary by KWMR. A beloved West Marin tradition for the whole family.
events.notes: Day 2 of the 2-day Western Weekend festival (Jun 6–7). Parade noon on Main St; Food Corral from 11:30am at Toby's Feed Barn; KWMR DJ + commentary. From westernweekend.org.
events.event_name_es: Western Weekend: Día 2 — Desfile
events.description_es: El desfile de Western Weekend comienza al mediodía en Main Street en Point Reyes Station: caballos engalanados, carrozas coloridas, bandas locales, bailarines y autos clásicos. Llega temprano para un buen lugar. El Food Corral abre a las 11:30 AM junto a Toby's Feed Barn, con música y comentarios en vivo del desfile por KWMR. Una querida tradición de West Marin para toda la familia.

events.venue: Mill Valley Public Library — Creekside Room
events.description: Discover the Recycled Orchestra of Paraguay and build your own musical instrument from recycled materials in this hands-on, interactive program. Ages 5+. Registration required; register at millvalleylibrary.gov/kids.
events.event_name_es: Orquesta Reciclada
events.description_es: Descubre la Orquesta Reciclada de Paraguay y construye tu propio instrumento musical con materiales reciclados en este programa interactivo. Edades 5+. Se requiere registro en millvalleylibrary.gov/kids.

events.venue: Mill Valley Public Library — Smart Garden
events.description: Celebrate the end of Summer Reading with food, bubbles, face painting, and fun activities for all ages at this lively end-of-summer bash. No registration required.
events.event_name_es: Fiesta de Fin de Verano
events.description_es: Celebra el fin de la Lectura de Verano con comida, burbujas, pintura de caras y actividades divertidas para todas las edades. No se requiere registro.

events.address: Depot Plaza, 87 Throckmorton Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Downtown Mill Valley summer hangout at Depot Plaza with a partial Miller Ave street closure: DJ set, outdoor dining from local restaurants, pop-up market of Mill Valley merchants, plus kids crafts and a bounce house. Free, all ages.
events.event_name_es: Miller Nights
events.description_es: Encuentro veraniego en el centro de Mill Valley en Depot Plaza con cierre parcial de Miller Ave: DJ, comida al aire libre de restaurantes locales, mercado pop-up de comerciantes y, para los niños, manualidades y un brincolín. Gratis, todas las edades.

events.address: Depot Plaza, 87 Throckmorton Ave, Mill Valley, CA 94941
events.description: Downtown Mill Valley summer hangout at Depot Plaza with a partial Miller Ave street closure: DJ set, outdoor dining from local restaurants, pop-up market of Mill Valley merchants, plus kids crafts and a bounce house. Free, all ages.
events.event_name_es: Miller Nights
events.description_es: Encuentro veraniego en el centro de Mill Valley en Depot Plaza con cierre parcial de Miller Ave: DJ, comida al aire libre de restaurantes locales, mercado pop-up de comerciantes y, para los niños, manualidades y un brincolín. Gratis, todas las edades.

events.address: China Camp State Park, San Rafael, CA 94901
events.description: Watch plein air artists at work throughout China Camp State Park and join a painting class. Free event; park day-use parking fee may apply.
events.event_name_es: Evento de Pintura al Aire Libre ‘Brush with Nature’
events.description_es: Observa a artistas pintando al aire libre por todo el parque estatal China Camp y participa en una clase de pintura. Evento gratuito; puede aplicar tarifa de estacionamiento del parque.

events.event_name: Brits by the Bay — Classic British Car Show
events.address: Bon Air Center, 50 Bon Air Center, Greenbrae, CA 94904
events.description: Stroll among classic British cars at this free, family-friendly car show on the Bon Air Center lawn.
events.event_name_es: Brits by the Bay — Exposición de Autos Clásicos Británicos
events.description_es: Pasea entre autos clásicos británicos en esta exposición gratuita y familiar en el césped de Bon Air Center.

events.venue: Old Corte Madera Square — Piccolo Pavilion
events.event_name: Summer Sunday Concerts — Old Corte Madera Square
events.address: Old Corte Madera Square, Corte Madera, CA 94925
events.description: Season-opening concert of the free Summer Sunday Concerts at the Piccolo Pavilion: Greg Loiacono & Sting Ray. 5–6:30 pm. Bring a blanket or lawn chairs.
events.event_name_es: Conciertos de Domingo de Verano — Old Corte Madera Square
events.description_es: Concierto de apertura de la temporada de conciertos gratuitos en el Piccolo Pavilion: Greg Loiacono & Sting Ray. 5–6:30 pm. Trae una manta o sillas de jardín.

events.event_name: Reading Buddies — Read to a Teen Volunteer
events.description: Kids entering grade 1 and up read to a friendly teen volunteer in 30-minute sessions through the summer. Sign up for one session per day per child via the library calendar.
events.event_name_es: Compañeros de Lectura — Lee con un Voluntario Adolescente
events.description_es: Niños que entran a primer grado en adelante leen con un voluntario adolescente en sesiones de 30 minutos durante el verano. Reserva una sesión por día por niño en el calendario de la biblioteca.

events.event_name: Friday Movie Nights at the Mart
events.description: Family-friendly outdoor movie night every Friday at 6 pm on the lawn at Marin Country Mart, June 19 through October 30. Grab dinner from the Mart's restaurants and settle in.
events.event_name_es: Noches de Cine de los Viernes en el Mart
events.description_es: Noche de cine familiar al aire libre todos los viernes a las 6 pm en el césped de Marin Country Mart, del 19 de junio al 30 de octubre. Compra la cena en los restaurantes del Mart y acomódate.

events.address: Piper Park, 250 Doherty Dr, Larkspur, CA 94939
events.description: The Larkspur Chamber of Commerce's 2nd Annual Battle of the Bands — five hours of live music from seven bands (Meaty Ogres, Rock Candy, Citizen Flannel, The Velvet Fog, Gas Money, Void Where Prohibited, and Supersonic), plus food, drinks, a marketplace, and a free all-day Kids' Zone by Andrews Camps. Tickets: $45 general admission, $20 under 20, free under 5. Free parking at Piper Park, Redwood HS, and Lucky shopping center.
events.event_name_es: Batalla de las Bandas
events.description_es: 2ª Batalla de las Bandas anual de la Cámara de Comercio de Larkspur: cinco horas de música en vivo con siete bandas, además de comida, bebidas, un mercado y una Zona Infantil gratuita todo el día a cargo de Andrews Camps. Entradas: $45 general, $20 menores de 20, gratis menores de 5 años. Estacionamiento gratuito en Piper Park, Redwood HS y el centro comercial Lucky.

events.description: Free hands-on DIY workshop for kids ages 5–12. Each child builds a take-home wood project with all tools and materials provided, and gets a Kids Workshops apron, an achievement pin, and a certificate. A different take-home project each month (e.g., Goalie Game in June, Go Kart in July). Held the first Saturday of each month, drop in anytime 9 a.m.–noon, while supplies last. A parent or guardian should help their child. Registration recommended to reserve a kit.
events.notes: First Saturday of each month, 9 a.m.–noon. Free; supplies are limited, so registration is recommended to reserve a kit: homedepot.com/workshops. San Rafael store #657. An extra workshop is also held November 21, 2026. 2026 themes (project varies monthly): Feb 7 Penguin Mailbox; Mar 7 Leprechaun Trap; Apr 4 Farm Planter; May 2 Keepsake Box; Jun 6 Goalie Game; Jul 4 Go Kart; Aug 1 Rocket Game; Sep 5 School Bus Organizer; Oct 3 Witch Candy Box; Nov 7 Dump Truck; Dec 5 Holiday Train; Jan 2 2027 Claw Machine Bank.
events.event_name_es: Taller para Niños de Home Depot
events.description_es: Taller práctico y gratuito de bricolaje para niños de 5 a 12 años. Cada niño construye un proyecto de madera para llevar a casa, con todas las herramientas y materiales incluidos, y recibe un delantal, un pin de logro y un certificado. Cada mes hay un proyecto diferente (por ejemplo, Goalie Game en junio, Go Kart en julio). Se realiza el primer sábado de cada mes; pueden llegar en cualquier momento de 9 a. m. a mediodía, hasta agotar existencias. Un padre o tutor debe ayudar al niño. Se recomienda registrarse para reservar un kit.

events.event_name: Wednesday Night Rodeo — Moms & Babies Hike
events.description: A weekly 2-mile round-trip hike for moms and babies — bring a carrier or a stroller. Meet at 4:55 PM at the Rodeo Ave Trailhead in Sausalito; on the trail from 5 to 6 PM. Every Wednesday, rain or shine.
events.notes: Weekly, every Wednesday. Meet 4:55 PM; on the trail 5–6 PM. About 2 miles round trip. Carrier- and stroller-friendly. Meet at the Rodeo Ave Trailhead, Sausalito.
events.event_name_es: Wednesday Night Rodeo — Caminata para Mamás y Bebés
events.description_es: Caminata semanal de 2 millas (ida y vuelta) para mamás y bebés — trae un portabebés o un cochecito. Punto de encuentro a las 4:55 PM en el Rodeo Ave Trailhead en Sausalito; en el sendero de 5 a 6 PM. Todos los miércoles, llueva o truene.

events.description: Copperfield's Books celebrates its 45th anniversary with a community cake picnic at Marin Country Mart in Larkspur. A family-friendly celebration with cake and community fun.
events.notes: Exact start time to confirm.
events.event_name_es: Picnic del 45º Aniversario de Copperfield's Books
events.description_es: Copperfield's Books celebra su 45º aniversario con un picnic comunitario con pastel en Marin Country Mart en Larkspur. Una celebración familiar con pastel y diversión comunitaria.

events.description: Fairfax's beloved annual festival and Ecofest: a parade, live music, food and drink, arts and crafts, kids' entertainment, an Ecofest, and a flea market, in downtown Fairfax. Saturday and Sunday, starting at 10 am.

events.event_name_es: Celebración del 250 Aniversario de Angel Island — 3 de julio
events.address: Angel Island State Park, Tiburon, CA 94920
events.description: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of the United States at Angel Island State Park. Enjoy living history volunteers, cannon firing demonstrations at 12 pm and 1 pm, the officer's home and bake house open to the public, and free self-guided immigration museum tours. 11 am–4 pm. Island activities free; ferry from Tiburon required (paid).
events.description_es: Celebra el 250 Aniversario de los Estados Unidos en Angel Island State Park. Disfruta de voluntarios de historia viva, demostraciones de cañón a las 12 pm y 1 pm, la casa de oficiales y la panadería abiertos al público, y visitas autoguiadas gratuitas al museo de inmigración. 11 am–4 pm. Actividades en la isla gratis; ferry desde Tiburon requerido (pago).
events.notes: Multi-day event: expires=2026-07-05 (last day). Ferry from Tiburon dock (Main St) is paid. Day 1 of 3.

events.event_name_es: Celebración del 250 Aniversario de Angel Island — 4 de julio
events.address: Angel Island State Park, Tiburon, CA 94920
events.description: The 4th of July at Angel Island's 250th Anniversary celebration. Highlights include FREE kayaking (ages 9+, waivers required), cannon firing demonstrations, Junior Lifeguard demonstration, beach swimming, an ice cream social by the Angel Island Conservancy, family arts and crafts, and free immigration museum tours. Food concessions on site. 11 am–4 pm. Ferry from Tiburon required (paid). Evening fireworks viewing is a separate ticketed event.
events.description_es: El 4 de julio en la celebración del 250 Aniversario de Angel Island. Los momentos destacados incluyen kayak GRATIS (9+ años, se requieren formularios de exención), demostraciones de cañón, demostración de guardavidas junior, natación en la playa, una heladería social de la Conservancy de Angel Island, manualidades para familias y visitas gratuitas al museo de inmigración. Venta de alimentos en el lugar. 11 am–4 pm. Ferry desde Tiburon requerido (pago).
events.notes: Multi-day: expires=2026-07-05. FREE kayaking is the Jul 4 headline. Day 2 of 3.

events.event_name_es: Celebración del 250 Aniversario de Angel Island — 5 de julio
events.address: Angel Island State Park, Tiburon, CA 94920
events.description: Final day of the 250th Anniversary celebration at Angel Island State Park. Living history volunteers, cannon firing demonstrations at 12 pm and 1 pm, historic buildings open to the public, and self-guided immigration museum tours (Detention Barracks Museum: $5 adults, $3 youth; Angel Island Immigration Museum: free). 11 am–4 pm.
